default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on SEO, content, and technical site health.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GTM Schema Blocked:** Dynamic schema setup is blocked by undefined variables in GTM. Carly will investigate after receiving view-only access.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Blog Redesign Approved:** The blog will be restructured with category subpaths (e.g., `/blog/product-updates/`) to improve UX and create a clear SEO hierarchy.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Critical Site Issues Found:** A technical audit revealed a server loopback issue, 22 404s, and 44 orphaned URLs requiring immediate attention.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Paused:** 14 drafts are ready for review, but comparative listicles are on hold pending internal alignment on competitor-focused content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit Findings

  - [A technical crawl identified several critical issues post-migration.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [**Major Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Server Loopback:** A rare server issue affecting all indexed pages. Carly is researching a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**404 Errors:** 22 pages return 404s; Vizcom must decide whether to redirect or restore them.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Orphaned URLs:** 44 pages exist in the sitemap but have no internal links, preventing them from being crawled and ranked.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Missing H1s:** Several URLs lack H1 tags, a key SEO element.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Empty Content Pages:** Indexable pages with placeholder content were found, suggesting they were published accidentally.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Warnings:** Minor issues like links without internal outlinks were noted but are not high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

### GTM Schema Implementation

  - [**Problem:** Dynamic schema setup in GTM is failing due to undefined variables (e.g., `page title`, `meta description`).](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** The GTM preview and Google's Rich Results Test both confirm the variables are not being pulled correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Action:** Carly will investigate the correct dynamic variable configuration after receiving view-only GTM access.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Note:** The `Organization` schema tag must be restricted to the homepage only.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Blog Strategy & Redesign

  - [**Problem:** The current blog hub page is visually overwhelming due to large featured posts and a flat structure, creating a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Solution:** Restructure the blog around category subpaths.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Hub Page:** Feature one hero post and small grids for each category (e.g., Product Updates, Community).](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Category Pages:** Each category becomes a dedicated page with its own URL (e.g., `/blog/product-updates/`).](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Breadcrumbs:** Implement breadcrumb navigation on individual articles to show the user's path (e.g., Home \> Blog \> Category \> Article).](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This creates a clear hierarchy for users and search engines, improving UX and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [14 drafts are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [5 new drafts are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [4 articles are being revised today based on Vizcom's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Publishing Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Publish \~10 articles/week to clear the backlog, then return to the standard 5/week.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Comparative listicles are on hold pending internal alignment on competitor-focused content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Vizcom to approve topics in the "Considering" tab of the content tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

      - [Update the content tracker to pause comparative listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Vizcom:**](https://fathom.video/share/hmA3ezWeyc4o1u7zj8osXUQ8hqvzb6yb?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
